This case study has been retired.

The earlier case study at this URL claimed an outcome we have since tested against our own domain and could not substantiate. The product that produced the claim has been pulled from sale. The diagnostic work we did for the named customer was real and valuable. The causal claim layered on top of it was not.

If you are connected to a named customer here and want an honest accounting of what we did and did not do, please write directly.

Lance@hi.neverranked.com

Day 30
